task_completion.description: Open the accounting software (Manager.io) and access the Northwind Traders business.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io application window is open and 'Northwind Traders' is visible as the active business.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Reports section and select the Profit and Loss Statement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reports' tab is active and the 'Profit and Loss Statement' configuration or viewing screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Generate the Profit and Loss Statement for the specific period of 2024-03-01 to 2024-03-31.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date fields for the report are set to start on 2024-03-01 and end on 2024-03-31, or the generated report header explicitly shows this date range.

task_completion.description: Open or create the target text file at /home/ga/Documents/pnl_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal is open, showing the file path '/home/ga/Documents/pnl_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Record the Total Income, Total Expenses, and Net Profit in the exact specified format without currency symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains exactly: 'Total Income: 11300', 'Total Expenses: 3200', and 'Net Profit: 8100' (decimals like .00 are acceptable, but no $ or other currency symbols).

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical interface to generate and view the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Manager.io UI to generate the report, rather than using terminal curl commands to hit the API directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the generated report before writing the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the generated Profit and Loss Statement on the screen with the calculated totals (11,300, 3,200, 8,100) visible in the accounting software.

integrity.description: The agent created the output file using standard OS tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation and editing happen in a real text editor (e.g., Text Editor/gedit) or via standard terminal commands (e.g., echo, nano, vim), not a simulated or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected values for the period 2024-03-01 to 2024-03-31 are: Total Income: 11300, Total Expenses: 3200, and Net Profit: 8100. The output file must be at /home/ga/Documents/pnl_report.txt and formatted exactly with the labels 'Total Income: <amount>', 'Total Expenses: <amount>', and 'Net Profit: <amount>' containing numeric values only (no currency symbols).
